title: rhododendron thomsonii subsp. candelabrum
intro: Rhododendron thomsonii subsp. candelabrum, also known as the Himalayan rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ericaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron thomsonii subsp. candelabrum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, and can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
